params.name: query
params.description: Search query string to match against API names and descriptions

params.name: category
params.description: Filter results by category slug

params.name: collection
params.description: Filter results by collection identifier

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by API type

params.name: verified
params.description: Filter to only show verified APIs

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return

items.docs: Searches the RapidAPI marketplace for APIs matching the provided query string. Supports filtering by category, collection, API type, and verification status. Returns paginated results with API summaries.
Retrieves all API categories available on the RapidAPI marketplace, including category names, slugs, and the number of APIs in each.

params.name: categorySlug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug of the category

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return

items.docs: Retrieves all APIs within a specific category on the RapidAPI marketplace, sorted by popularity or relevance.

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return

items.docs: Retrieves all curated API collections on the RapidAPI marketplace. Collections group APIs with similar characteristics or themes.

params.name: collectionId
params.description: The unique identifier of the collection

params.name: offset
params.description: The number of items to skip for pagination

params.name: limit
params.description: The maximum number of items to return

items.docs: Retrieves all APIs within a specific curated collection on the RapidAPI marketplace.

params.name: apiSlug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug or identifier of the API

items.docs: Retrieves detailed information about a specific API on the marketplace, including its description, endpoints, pricing plans, ratings, and provider information.

params.name: apiSlug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug or identifier of the API

items.docs: Retrieves the list of available endpoints for a specific API, including HTTP methods, paths, parameters, and response schemas.
Retrieves the authenticated user's active API subscriptions, including plan details and usage statistics.

params.name: apiSlug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug or identifier of the API

items.docs: Subscribes the authenticated user to a specific API plan on the marketplace. After subscribing, the user can make API calls using their RapidAPI key.

params.name: apiSlug
params.description: The URL-friendly slug or identifier of the API

params.name: endpointId
params.description: The identifier of the specific endpoint

params.name: language
params.description: The programming language for the code snippet

items.docs: Generates code snippets for calling a specific API endpoint in various programming languages and libraries, including JavaScript, Python, PHP, Ruby, Java, and more.
